title.ko: 상수(上水) 또는 폐수(廢水)용의 가정용 배관 설비(급수 본관(本管) 또는 폐수관(廢水管)의 어느 쪽에도 급수되지 않는 것 A47K; 지하에서 사용되고 있는 종류의 장치 E03B, E03F); 개수대
title.en: DOMESTIC PLUMBING INSTALLATIONS FOR FRESH WATER OR WASTE WATER (not connected to either water-supply main or to waste pipe A47K;devices of the kind used in the ground E03B, E03F); SINKS

title.ko: 상수(上水) 또는 폐수(廢水)용의 가정용 배관 설비; 개수대
title.en: Domestic plumbing installations for fresh water or waste water; Sinks
for combinations of baths, showers, sinks, wash-basins, closets, urinals, or the like

title.ko: 상수(上水)용의 배관 설비
title.en: Plumbing installations for fresh water

title.ko: 특히 세면기 또는 욕조에 사용되는 수조(水槽) 설비(밸브, 급수전(給水栓), 혼수변(混手辨) , 전(栓) F16K)
title.en: Water-basin installations specially adapted to wash-basins or baths (valves, faucets, mixing valves, taps F16K)
Arrangements on taps for wash-basins or baths for connecting to the wall

title.ko: 급수관의 가열 또는 냉각 장치를 갖는 것(온수기, 예. 연속적으로 흐르는 것 F24H)
title.en: having a heating or cooling apparatus in the supply line (water heaters, e.g. with continuous flow, F24H)

title.ko: 급수관 속에 비누, 소독제 또는 그 유사물을 첨가한 것(음료수관의 오염 방지 E03C 1/10)
title.en: Adding soap, disinfectant, or the like, in the supply line (preventing contamination of drinking-water pipes E03C0001100000)
supplying water through two or more openings around or along one side of the water-basin

title.ko: 수조, 욕조, 개수대 또는 그 유사물에 부착시키기 위한 원격 조작 전(栓)용의 장치(전(栓)의 원격 조작 또는 그 유사물 그 자체 F16K)
title.en: Arrangements of devices on wash-basins, baths, sinks, or the like, for remote control of taps (remote control of taps or the like, per seF16K)
Devices for suspending or supporting the supply pipe or supply hose of a shower-bath
Jet regulators, e.g. anti-splash devices
Jet regulators with aerating means
Jet regulators or jet guides, easily mountable on the outlet of taps

title.ko: 음료수 관 오염 방지 장치, 예. 자동 폐쇄 차단 밸브에 공기를 혼입하는 수단(진공 해제 장치 일반 F16K, F16L)
title.en: Devices for preventing contamination of drinking-water pipes, e.g. means for aerating self-closing flushing valves (vacuum-breakers in general F16K, F16L)

title.ko: 폐수용(廢水用) 배관 설비; 그것에 결급(結給)되는 세면기 또는 분수기(噴水器)(바닥의 배수(配水) 장치 E03F 5/04); 개수대
title.en: Plumbing installations for waste water; Basins or fountains connected thereto (drainage devices in floors E03F0005040000); Sinks

title.ko: 건물의 폐수용 관로계(管路系)(관로계(管路系) 일반 F17D)
title.en: Pipe-line systems for waste water in buildings (pipe-line systems in general F17D)
Installations for disinfecting or deodorising waste-water plumbing installations
Wash-basins connected to the waste pipe
Wash-fountains connected to the waste pipe

title.ko: 폐수관에 결합되거나 또는 결합되지 않은 개수대
title.en: Sinks, whether or not connected to the waste-pipe

title.ko: 개수대의 튐 방지 장치 (제트 레귤레이터 E03C 1/08)
title.en: Anti-splash devices in sinks, e.g. splash guards (jet regulators E03C0001080000)

title.ko: 폐수관에 결합된 것
title.en: connected to the waste pipe

title.ko: 세탁기, 냉난방 장치의 설치에 사용되는 것(설치용 세탁기 D06F 7/00)
title.en: adapted for attachment of washing machines or heating or cooling devices (washing machines for attachment D06F0007000000)
Separate partition walls, lids, protecting borders, or the like, for sinks
Connecting baths or bidets to the waste pipe

title.ko: 수조, 욕조 또는 개수대에 설치한 유출 장치(스톱퍼- stopper A47K 1/14)
title.en: Outlet devices mounted in basins, baths, or sinks (stoppers A47K0001140000)

title.ko: 기계적인 폐쇄 기구를 갖는 것
title.en: with mechanical closure mechanisms

title.ko: 오버플로우(overflow) 장치를 병용하는 것(수조, 욕조용 오버플로우 장치 그 자체 E03C 1/24)
title.en: combined with overflow devices (overflow devices for basins or baths per seE03C0001240000)

title.ko: 수조, 욕조용 오버플로우 장치(E03C 1/232가 우선)
title.en: Overflow devices for basins or baths (E03C0001232000 takes precedence)
automatically actuating supply or draining valves
Separate devices to be placed on the outlet opening

title.ko: 배수관 또는 배출구에 사용되는 목적물 포착용 부속품 또는 유사한 장치 (E03C 1/28이 우선)
title.en: Object-catching inserts or similar devices for waste pipes or outlets (E03C0001280000 takes precedence)
combined with outlet stoppers
Separate sieves or similar object-catching inserts
Arrangement of disintegrating apparatus in waste pipes or outlets; Disintegrating apparatus specially adapted for installation in waste pipes or outlets

title.ko: 악취방지용 실(seal)
title.en: Odour seals
combined with additional object-catching devices

title.ko: Ｕ자형 트랩(trap)을 갖는 것
title.en: having U-shaped trap
having hand-operated valves against return of waste water

title.ko: 폐수의 역류에 대하여 역류 방지 밸브를 갖는 것(E03C 1/286이 우선)
title.en: having non-return valves against return of waste water (E03C0001286000 takes precedence)
having housing containing dividing wall, e.g. tubular
having elastic housing
with provisions against loss of water lock
using air-supply valves
using water-supply valves
consisting only of non-return valve
Devices to facilitate removing of obstructions in waste pipes or sinks
using devices moved through the pipes
using fluid under pressure
by means of a tube connected to the water mains
by means of a pumping device
Holders or supports for basins
connected to the wall only
adjustable
resting on the floor
adjustable
Fastening sinks or basins in an apertured support
